Author: Briette
Name: Custom Sounds
Punchline:
No, it's not your imagination. Patch 7.5 changed some sound effects to be annoyingly high pitched!
Revert those changes plus setup other things like custom Quest Themes, mute housing ambient water, etc.
Description:
Revert to pre-patch 7.5 system sound effects for less high pitched vendor, item retrieval, countdown and other noises.

Choose your Quest Accept/Complete sounds.

Have a housing build that uses tons of furniture with ambient water sounds? Mute and unmute them easily!

More sound options to come. Suggestions are welcome. Contact info on repo page
